# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

version: '3.8'
services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:latest
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    command: redis-server --masterauth ""
    volumes:
      - redis-master-data:/data
    restart: always

  redis-slave1:
    image: redis:latest
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    ports:
      - "6380:6379"
    environment:
      REDIS_REPLICATION_MODE: slave
      REDIS_MASTER_HOST: redis-master
      REDIS_MASTER_PORT: 6379
    volumes:
      - redis-slave1-data:/data
    restart: always

volumes:
  redis-master-data:
  redis-slave1-data:
